Our Electrical Services

<div class="space-y-12">
  <article class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-8 items-center">
    <div class="bg-primary/5 rounded-2xl p-8">
      <div class="text-5xl mb-4">⚡</div>
      <h3 class="text-2xl font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Electrical Repairs</h3>
      <p class="text-gray-700">Fast and reliable electrical repairs for homes and businesses in Lafayette, LA. Our experienced electricians can diagnose and fix any electrical issue, from minor repairs to major troubleshooting.</p>
      <ul class="mt-4 space-y-2 text-gray-600">
        <li>• Circuit breaker repairs</li>
        <li>• Outlet and switch repairs</li>
        <li>• Wiring repairs</li>
        <li>• Lighting repairs</li>
        <li>• Emergency repairs</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-gray-100 rounded-2xl p-8">
      <h4 class="text-lg font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Common Repair Issues We Fix:</h4>
      <ul class="space-y-3 text-gray-700">
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> Flickering lights</li>
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> Tripping breakers</li>
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> Dead outlets</li>
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> Burning smells</li>
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> Sparking outlets</li>
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> Power outages</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </article>

  <article class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-8 items-center">
    <div class="bg-gray-100 rounded-2xl p-8 order-2 lg:order-1">
      <h4 class="text-lg font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">What We Install:</h4>
      <ul class="space-y-3 text-gray-700">
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> Ceiling fans</li>
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> Light fixtures</li>
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> Outlets and switches</li>
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> Electrical panels</li>
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> Whole house generators</li>
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> EV chargers</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-primary/5 rounded-2xl p-8 order-1 lg:order-2">
      <div class="text-5xl mb-4">🔧</div>
      <h3 class="text-2xl font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Installation Services</h3>
      <p class="text-gray-700">Professional electrical installations for new construction, renovations, and upgrades. We handle everything from simple fixture replacements to complete electrical system installations.</p>
      <ul class="mt-4 space-y-2 text-gray-600">
        <li>• New construction wiring</li>
        <li>• Renovation wiring</li>
        <li>• Panel upgrades</li>
        <li>• Outdoor lighting</li>
        <li>• Smart home wiring</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </article>

  <article class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-8 items-center">
    <div class="bg-primary/5 rounded-2xl p-8">
      <div class="text-5xl mb-4">🔍</div>
      <h3 class="text-2xl font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Electrical Inspections</h3>
      <p class="text-gray-700">Comprehensive electrical safety inspections to ensure your property meets all local codes and safety standards. We provide detailed reports and recommend necessary repairs or upgrades.</p>
      <ul class="mt-4 space-y-2 text-gray-600">
        <li>• Safety inspections</li>
        <li>• Code compliance</li>
        <li>• Pre-purchase inspections</li>
        <li>• Insurance inspections</li>
        <li>• Annual maintenance</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-gray-100 rounded-2xl p-8">
      <h4 class="text-lg font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Why Inspections Matter:</h4>
      <ul class="space-y-3 text-gray-700">
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> Prevent electrical fires</li>
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> Ensure code compliance</li>
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> Protect your insurance</li>
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> Peace of mind</li>
        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="text-primary">✓</span> Identify hidden issues</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </article>
</div>

How We Work

Simple, professional process to get your electrical work done right

<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
  <div class="text-center">
    <div class="bg-primary text-white w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xl font-bold mx-auto mb-4">1</div>
    <h3 class="font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Call or Contact</h3>
    <p class="text-gray-600 text-sm">Reach out to discuss your electrical needs</p>
  </div>
  <div class="text-center">
    <div class="bg-primary text-white w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xl font-bold mx-auto mb-4">2</div>
    <h3 class="font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Free Estimate</h3>
    <p class="text-gray-600 text-sm">We provide a detailed, free estimate</p>
  </div>
  <div class="text-center">
    <div class="bg-primary text-white w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xl font-bold mx-auto mb-4">3</div>
    <h3 class="font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Schedule Service</h3>
    <p class="text-gray-600 text-sm">Book a convenient time for the work</p>
  </div>
  <div class="text-center">
    <div class="bg-primary text-white w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xl font-bold mx-auto mb-4">4</div>
    <h3 class="font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Quality Work</h3>
    <p class="text-gray-600 text-sm">We complete the job to highest standards</p>
  </div>
</div>

Frequently Asked Questions

<div class="max-w-3xl mx-auto space-y-4">
  <details class="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl group">
    <summary class="cursor-pointer px-6 py-4 font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 flex justify-between items-center">
      How much does an electrical repair cost?
      <span class="text-primary group-open:rotate-180 transition-transform">▼</span>
    </summary>
    <div class="px-6 pb-4 text-gray-700">
      Our electrical repair services start at $75 for minor issues. Final costs depend on the complexity of the repair. We provide free estimates before starting any work, so you'll know exactly what to expect. Call 3018229 to discuss your specific needs.
    </div>
  </details>

  <details class="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl group">
    <summary class="cursor-pointer px-6 py-4 font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 flex justify-between items-center">
      What areas do you serve?
      <span class="text-primary group-open:rotate-180 transition-transform">▼</span>
    </summary>
    <div class="px-6 pb-4 text-gray-700">
      We proudly serve Lafayette, LA and the surrounding areas including Broussard, Youngsville, Scott, Carencro, and the greater Acadiana region. Contact us to confirm we serve your specific location.
    </div>
  </details>

  <details class="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl group">
    <summary class="cursor-pointer px-6 py-4 font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 flex justify-between items-center">
      Do you offer free estimates?
      <span class="text-primary group-open:rotate-180 transition-transform">▼</span>
    </summary>
    <div class="px-6 pb-4 text-gray-700">
      Yes! We offer free estimates for all electrical services. We'll come to your location, assess the work needed, and provide a detailed quote with no obligation. Schedule your free estimate today by contacting us.
    </div>
  </details>

  <details class="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl group">
    <summary class="cursor-pointer px-6 py-4 font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 flex justify-between items-center">
      Are you licensed and insured?
      <span class="text-primary group-open:rotate-180 transition-transform">▼</span>
    </summary>
    <div class="px-6 pb-4 text-gray-700">
      Yes, we are fully licensed and insured for all electrical work in Louisiana. Our team consists of experienced, certified electricians who prioritize safety and quality on every job. You can trust us for reliable, professional service.
    </div>
  </details>

  <details class="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl group">
    <summary class="cursor-pointer px-6 py-4 font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 flex justify-between items-center">
      How long does an electrical installation take?
      <span class="text-primary group-open:rotate-180 transition-transform">▼</span>
    </summary>
    <div class="px-6 pb-4 text-gray-700">
      Installation times vary depending on the project scope. Simple fixture replacements can be done in an hour or two, while full panel upgrades or new construction wiring may take several days. We'll provide a timeline estimate when we give you your quote.
    </div>
  </details>

  <details class="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl group">
    <summary class="cursor-pointer px-6 py-4 font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 flex justify-between items-center">
      Do you offer emergency electrical services?
      <span class="text-primary group-open:rotate-180 transition-transform">▼</span>
    </summary>
    <div class="px-6 pb-4 text-gray-700">
      Yes, we understand electrical emergencies can happen anytime. We offer 24/7 emergency electrical services for urgent issues like power outages, sparking outlets, and other hazardous electrical problems. Call our emergency line for immediate assistance.
    </div>
  </details>

  <details class="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl group">
    <summary class="cursor-pointer px-6 py-4 font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 flex justify-between items-center">
      What types of properties do you service?
      <span class="text-primary group-open:rotate-180 transition-transform">▼</span>
    </summary>
    <div class="px-6 pb-4 text-gray-700">
      We service both residential and commercial properties in Lafayette, LA. From homes and apartments to offices, retail spaces, and industrial facilities, our experienced team can handle all your electrical needs.
    </div>
  </details>
</div>

Need Electrical Services?

Contact us today for a free estimate on any electrical project!

Get A Free Quote

Make electricity good for everyone
